steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; if ( class_exists( 'WC_Install' ) ) { WC_Install::create_pages(); } if ( class_exists( 'WC_Shipping_Zone' ) ) { $zone = new WC_Shipping_Zone(); $zone->set_zone_name( 'Polska' ); $zone->set_zone_locations( array( array( 'code' => 'PL', 'type' => 'country' ) ) ); $zone_id = (int) $zone->save(); if ( $zone_id > 0 ) { $zone = new WC_Shipping_Zone( $zone_id ); $instance_id = (int) $zone->add_shipping_method( 'dhl_polska_flat_rate' ); if ( $instance_id > 0 ) { update_option( 'woocommerce_dhl_polska_flat_rate_' . $instance_id . '_settings', array( 'enabled' => 'yes', 'title' => 'DHL Polska', 'tax_status' => 'none', 'service' => 'AH', 'cost' => '15' ) ); } } } ?>
